name: White Spam and Garlic Pizza
recipeIngredient: Premade pizza crust or other favorite crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (232 degrees C).
2. Place the provalone and mozzarella cheeses on the pizza crust.
3. Dollop spoonfuls of ricotta cheese over the cheeses.
4. Process the minced Spam and garlic in a food processor until smooth.
5. Sprinkle the Spam and garlic paste evenly over the pizza.
6. Sprinkle grated Romano cheese over the top.
7. Bake in the preheated oven until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted, about 10-12 minutes. Turn off the heat and remove the pizza from the oven.
